shorts.content: The Calder Cup Playoffs are down to four teams. None of the regular season’s four division champions remain as the Laval Rocket also went home early. Now the Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins and Toronto Marlies both move on to the best-of-seven Eastern Conferen…

shorts.title: Fans rally around Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins
shorts.description: WILKES-BARRE TOWNSHIP, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Penguins are fighting for a spot in the Calder Cup finals, and on Wednesday night, fans in Wilkes-Barre Township treated a road game like a home game. Fans packed Miller's Ale House for Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Finals. The Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins were in Canada, taking on [...]

shorts.title: Memorial revealed honoring passed student
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A school community came together to honor one of its own after a deadly incident involving her boyfriend last December. Wednesday, her family was presented with her high school diploma during an emotional ceremony. To say the start of 2026 has been difficult for the Hernandez family would be an [...]
